signals.headline: US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan collapse without agreement; Kushner and Witkoff blamed for spoiling negotiations due to
signals.raw:
US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan collapse without agreement; Kushner and Witkoff blamed for spoiling negotiations due to Iran's distrust.** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2]

Recent reports confirm that high-level US-Iran talks in Islamabad, hosted by Pakistan and involving VP JD Vance alongside Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, ended after 21 hours with no deal on core issues like Iran's nuclear program
